name: tide_airdrop
description: TIDE airdrop eligibility per wallet. Buckets: veBaoSnapshot, boosters, raise, ledgerMarks. Boosters: 15M TIDE across 35 ranked boosters (wallet mapping pending — UI shows 0 until addresses are assigned). Raise: 50M TIDE pro-rata by USDC deposited in raise contract (refunded wallets excluded). Ledger marks: pro-rata from maiden voyage (launch/euro/metals) and anchor-sail leaderboards, 25M TIDE total, min 10 TIDE, 40% per-wallet cap with redistribution.
